scripts.test:python: command -v pytest >/dev/null 2>&1 && python3 -m pytest tests/ -v || python3 -m unittest discover tests/ -v
scripts.verify: node verify-worker.mjs && node verify-schema.mjs && node verify-gemini-db-integration.mjs
scripts.audit: vitest run --config vitest.config.js && node verify-worker.mjs && node verify-schema.mjs && node verify-gemini-db-integration.mjs
